news.summary: Both parties have agreed to collaborate on a proof of concept (POC) project aimed at enhancing urban transit safety. The project will focus on the development and implementation of a precision curb detection system. The goal is to improve safety measures in urban areas by accurately detecting curbs to prevent accidents. This collaborative effort will bring together expertise from both sides to work towards achieving this important objective.
news.headline: Foresight and global automotive supplier team up for bus safety with 3D tech, focusing on precision curb detection.

news.summary: Teledigm Health and VirtuAlly have joined forces to provide extensive virtual nursing services to healthcare facilities in rural areas throughout the Midwest. The persistent shortage of nurses in the U.S. is significantly affecting rural healthcare systems. This partnership aims to address this issue and improve access to healthcare in these underserved regions. The collaboration was announced on May 14 in Charleston, S.C., and Lincoln, Neb. By leveraging virtual nursing solutions, they seek to bridge the gap and enhance medical services for residents in these areas.
news.headline: Teledigm Health and VirtuAlly partner to provide virtual nursing solutions to rural healthcare systems in the Midwest amid US nursing shortage.

news.summary: Experienced Sales Professional Hired to Drive Global Expansion in Private Markets and Enterprise Collaborations. On May 14, 2025, Inveniam Capital Partners disclosed that they have appointed R.W. as their newest member. Inveniam, a prominent data infrastructure platform specializing in private market assets, aims to leverage R.W.'s expertise to enhance their growth worldwide.
news.headline: Inveniam appoints R.W. Holleman as Chief Revenue Officer to drive global growth across private markets.

news.summary: A new set of customizable risk control tools has been introduced by Wisdomelite Trading Center, a renowned global digital asset trading platform recognized for its secure infrastructure and wide range of trading services. Launched on May 14, 2025, these tools are designed to empower advanced traders and institutions by providing them with enhanced risk management capabilities.
news.headline: Wisdomelite Trading Center unveils customizable risk control tools to empower traders and institutions.

news.summary: In a recent announcement on May 14, 2025, Momentum Life Sciences shared that Jennifer Wagner, the Vice President of Client Solutions, has been honored with a spot on the 2025 Elite 100 list by PM360 Magazine. Recognized in the Transformational Leadership category, Wagner's remarkable contributions have earned her this prestigious accolade. This achievement highlights her outstanding impact within the industry.
news.headline: Jennifer Wagner of Momentum Life Sciences named to PM360 Magazine's 2025 Elite 100 for Transformational Leadership.

news.summary: In Frederick, Maryland, on May 14, 2025, WellAve Dermatology revealed a recent collaboration, officially becoming the dedicated dermatology provider for the esteemed Frederick Keys baseball team. WellAve, known for its commitment to the community, views this partnership as an opportunity to further engage with the public...
news.headline: WellAve Dermatology partners with Frederick Keys baseball team in a community-focused initiative.Character count: 98

news.summary: In Bowling Green, Kentucky, Holley Performance Brands, a prominent player in automotive aftermarket performance products, is broadening its yearly Ford Fest event from focusing solely on Mustangs to a comprehensive celebration of all things Ford. This includes enhanced truck and off-road activities catering to the increasing interest in the Bronco and F-150 models. The 7th edition of Ford Fest will feature drag racing, off-road excursions, and dynamic motorsports competitions. Holley Performance Brands, listed as HLLY on NYSE, is aiming to attract a wider range of Ford enthusiasts with this expanded event.
news.headline: Holley Performance Brands to expand Ford Fest, celebrating all things Ford with new truck and off-road experiences. Ford Fest is now an action-packed celebration of all things Ford.

news.summary: In Carlsbad, California, MaxLinear has introduced web-smart 2.5G Ethernet Switch SoCs that bring advanced capabilities for network management and optimization to HiSource's upcoming PoE switches. These SoCs support speeds of up to 2.5G, enabling efficient data transfer. This collaboration aims to enhance connectivity solutions with smart features, catering to the demands of modern networks for improved performance.
news.headline: MaxLinear's 2.5G Ethernet Switch SoCs power HiSource's Smart PoE switches, enabling network management.

news.summary: Denver-based Spruce Power Holding Corporation (NYSE: SPRU) has recently revealed its approval of a share repurchase initiative, known as the "Share Repurchase Program," to buy back shares of its common stock. Under this program, the company plans to repurchase up to $50 million worth of shares by May 15, 2027. The current share repurchase program is set to expire on May 15, 2025, with the new program commencing thereafter. The Board of Directors sees this initiative as a strategic move to enhance shareholder value through opportunistic buybacks.
news.headline: Spruce Power to repurchase up to $50 million of common stock before May 15, 2027, following the expiry of current program.

news.summary: In Miami on May 14, 2025, CEO Coaching International, a top executive coaching firm for growth-oriented CEOs and entrepreneurs worldwide, welcomed Matt Dunie as its latest Partner and Coach. Renowned in the Information Services and SaaS sectors, Dunie brings extensive experience to the team.
news.headline: Former CEO of Cambridge Scientific Abstracts and LabArchives, Matt Dunie, joins CEO Coaching International as Partner and Coach on May 14, 2025. Leading executive coaching firm for growth-focused CEOs and entrepreneurs globally.

news.summary: In Sunrise, Florida on May 14, 2025, North American Partners in Anesthesia (NAPA) has once more been included in the Becker's Healthcare "150 Top Places to Work in Healthcare" list, making it their consecutive recognition since 2017. This acknowledgment highlights NAPA's dedication to creating a positive work environment and prioritizing employee satisfaction.
news.headline: NAPA Anesthesia recognized as top place to work in healthcare for fifth consecutive year by Becker's Healthcare.

news.summary: Prescient Healthcare Group, a prominent biopharma product and portfolio strategy firm based in London, revealed on May 14, 2025, their achievement of becoming a Certified B Corporation. This certification underscores the company's dedication to purpose-driven growth, sustainability, and creating a positive social impact. The certification signifies an important recognition of Prescient Healthcare Group's commitment to its values and mission.
news.headline: Prescient Healthcare Group earns B Corp Certification, highlighting commitment to purpose-driven growth and social impact.

news.summary: Secafy Co, Ltd. in France has established hardware adaptability, making it susceptible to side channel attacks. This adaptation allows for potential future algorithm upgrades without requiring the production of a new chip. The company is located in Valbonne and Sophia-Antipolis. On May 14, 2025, Menta SAS, a renowned embedded FPGA (eFPGA) supplier, collaborated with Secafy Co, Ltd. to develop this technology.
news.headline: Secafy licenses Menta's eFPGA IP for secure semiconductor design, offering adaptability & potential algorithm upgrades.

news.summary: A company based in Peoria, Illinois, ATS, has recently been chosen as a prestigious 2025 US Best Managed Gold Standard Company. The award, sponsored by Deloitte Private and The Wall Street Journal, highlights exceptional private companies in the United States. This recognition signifies ATS's excellence and dedication to their industry.
news.headline: ATS named US Best Managed Gold Standard Company for 5th year by Deloitte Private and The Wall Street Journal,  prestigious recognition.

news.summary: According to recent reports, the unemployment rate in the country hiked to 6.2% in the month of July, marking an increase of 0.4% from the previous month. This rise represents approximately 150,000 more individuals being unemployed. The total number of unemployed people in the nation now stands at 2.5 million. Additionally, the number of individuals employed decreased by 300,000, bringing the total employed population to 37.8 million. This data indicates a concerning trend in the job market and poses challenges for the country's economic recovery.
news.headline: On May 22, 2025, Onfolio Holdings Inc. will be presenting at the Emerging Growth Conference. Don't miss it!

news.summary: In the month of February, there was a notable decline in the percentage of patients filing telehealth claims, both across the nation and in all regions. A significant development occurred in February 2025 as overweight and obesity emerged as one of the top five diagnostic categories for telehealth consultations on a national scale, securing the fourth position. This information was disclosed by FAIR, showcasing the increasing importance and utilization of telehealth services in addressing healthcare needs related to weight management.
news.headline: Obesity a top telehealth diagnosis in Feb 2025, as national patient claims % drop, per FAIR data.

news.summary: Today, it was reported that Galloway & Company, LLC, a prominent architecture and engineering firm based in Greenwood Village, Colorado, has secured a significant strategic investment from ARA Services Partners and Kelso & Company. This move signals a notable development for Galloway, a nationwide A&E company. The financial details of the investment were not disclosed, but it is clear that this partnership is aimed at fostering growth and expansion for Galloway. This investment is anticipated to have a substantial impact on the company's operations and future prospects in the industry.
news.headline: Galloway & Company, LLC receives growth investment from ARA Services Partners and Kelso & Company on May 14, 2025.

news.summary: In Chicago on May 14, 2025, Dream Exchange celebrates Dr. Ioannis (Yianni) Floros for becoming the Hans G. Storr Associate Professor in Finance at the Lubar College of Business at the University of Wisconsin–Milwaukee (UWM). This prestigious appointment highlights Dr. Floros's expertise and contribution to the field of finance.
news.headline: Dr. Ioannis Floros appointed as Hans G. Storr Associate Professor in Finance at UWM. Chic 05/14/25. Congrats from Dream Exchange.

news.summary: In Kansas City, Missouri, on May 14, 2025, the American Public Works Association (APWA) with 32,000 members annually commemorates National Public Works Week (NPWW) to highlight the vital role of public works in communities across North America. This year’s NPWW will emphasize...
news.headline: 32,000 APWA members will showcase public works impact during National Public Works Week, May 18-24, 2025. #NPWW.

news.summary: The KREM Institute's latest A.I. Certified Agent 3.0 program is propelling over 1,100 agents into A.I.-enhanced ventures spanning 46 states and 10 countries. The updated certification is set to revolutionize the real estate industry, ensuring accredited individuals achieve unparalleled success. The program's launch in Cleveland on May 14, 2025, signifies a significant shift towards innovative and proven strategies for agents looking to thrive in this evolving landscape.
news.headline: A.I. Certified Agent 3.0 revolutionizes real estate with 1,100 agents in 46 states and 10 countries - Cleveland, May 14, 2025.

news.summary: The Noble Business Awards, hosted by the International Awards Associate (IAA), revealed the distinguished recipients of its first season on May 14, 2025, in New York. This prestigious accolade celebrates outstanding business figures, innovators, and entities that have showcased unparalleled excellence.
news.headline: 2025 Noble Business Awards announces elite winners for Season 1, honoring exceptional leaders and organizations.

news.summary: Celebrating its milestone 50th anniversary, Adeler Jewelers in Great Falls, Va., a distinguished family-run fine jewelry store recognized for its unique custom designs and superior quality, commemorates its five decades of operation since it was established in 1975. The boutique has significantly impacted the community with its exceptional craftsmanship and dedication to providing exquisite pieces to its customers.
news.headline: Adeler Jewelers, founded in 1975, celebrates 50 years of crafting bespoke jewelry, known for timeless elegance.

news.summary: In Richmond, Virginia, on May 14, 2025, SixFour3, a top brand for female fastpitch players, revealed significant achievements. The inauguration of SixFour3 Richmond at 9003 Old Staples Mill Road, Suite B marks a major milestone. This was made possible through a partnership with franchisees Darrell and Megan Kent.
news.headline: SixFour3 expands with Richmond opening and Maryland expansion, announces growth milestones in 2025.

news.summary: Navy Federal Credit Union has unveiled its updated Permanent Change of Station (PCS) Initiative in Vienna, Va., aiming to support Active Duty Servicemembers and their families in managing the challenges of PCS moves and ensuring financial readiness for such transitions. As military personnel frequently relocate, adaptation to new environments is crucial. The credit union has broadened its PCS services, streamlining the process for members.
news.headline: Navy Federal Credit Union in Virginia expands PCS program to assist military families with moving; focusing on financial preparedness.

news.summary: NETSOL Technologies reported a strong performance in Q3'25, with a 13% increase in total net revenues to $17.5 million compared to Q3'24. Service revenue saw a significant 24% growth to $9.7 million, and subscription and support revenues rose by 10% to $7.9 million. The net profit for Q3'2025 stood at $1.4 million. Gross profit was $8.7 million, operating expenses were $7.2 million, and GAAP net income was $1.4 million. Cash and cash equivalents were $18.8 million as of March 31, 2025. The company remains focused on innovation and operational efficiency, showcasing growth in various regions and sectors. NETSOL Technologies emphasized sustainable growth, product innovation, and delivering long-term value. Non-GAAP EBITDA for Q3'25 was $2.2 million, showing a positive trend for the company.
news.headline: NETSOL Technologies' Q3'25 saw $17.5m total net revenues, 13% increase YoY. Service revenue up 24% to $9.7m. Profits at $1.4m.
White House Eased China Tariffs After Warnings Of Harm To ‘Trump’s People’ - WaPo www.washingtonpost.com/business/202...

news.summary: Informatica, a leading enterprise cloud data management company and Oracle collaborator, has revealed the launch of its Master Data Management (MDM) service and Intelligent Data Management Cloud™ platform on Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI). This move allows customers to seamlessly utilize Informatica MDM within their OCI setup. Furthermore, Informatica has been recognized as a preferred partner for enterprise cloud data integration. The company's stock is traded on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol INFA.
news.headline: Informatica partners with Oracle Cloud to offer MDM service on OCI for seamless customer experience. #INFA #OCI #MDM

news.summary: Informatica, a prominent enterprise AI-powered cloud data management company, has recently revealed a strategic partnership with Microsoft. This agreement, announced at the Informatica World conference in Las Vegas, signifies the extension of their existing collaboration. Notably, Informatica trades on the NYSE under the ticker symbol INFA. This partnership aims to drive innovation and enhance customer adoption on the Microsoft Azure cloud platform. Both companies are dedicated to further advancing their work together.
news.headline: Informatica (NYSE: INFA) partners with Microsoft for strategic agreement to accelerate customer adoption on Azure.

news.summary: Informatica, a leading enterprise cloud data management company listed on NYSE under the symbol INFA, has recently revealed an enhanced collaboration with Databricks. This partnership aims to assist clients in upgrading their existing on-premises data lakes based on Hadoop. By utilizing Informatica's Intelligent Data Management Cloud™ platform together with the Databricks Data Intelligence Platform, organizations can establish a robust infrastructure conducive to handling analytics and AI operations efficiently. This development signifies a significant step towards enabling customers to optimize their data management processes effectively.
news.headline: Informatica partners with Databricks for modern cloud data management platform, aiding migration for customers.

news.summary: In Atlanta, cove, a leading AI for Architecture company, has revealed the champion of its first-ever Pitch Off competition.
news.headline: AI for Architecture company cove selects winner of inaugural Pitch Off; leading tech future, ATLANTA (BUSINESS WIRE) - important milestone.

news.summary: In Orlando, Florida, a recent business update reveals that Qlik has introduced a novel agentic experience featuring advanced AI agents. These specialized agents are designed to efficiently reveal insights, facilitate speedy decision-making, and enhance productivity for users.
news.headline: Qlik launches agentic experience in Orlando to speed up data-to-decision journeys with AI agents.

news.summary: A Chicago-based technology company, Tempus AI, Inc. (NASDAQ: TEM), has revealed a strategic partnership aimed at advancing Boehringer Ingelheim’s expanding cancer pipeline. This collaboration, spanning multiple years, signifies a progression from previous joint efforts, focusing on utilizing data and AI to propel therapeutic research and development. Tempus AI’s role involves pioneering AI applications for precision medicine and enhanced patient care. The announcement marks a significant step forward in leveraging advanced technologies to drive innovation in the pharmaceutical industry.
news.headline: Tempus partners with Boehringer Ingelheim for cancer pipeline, leveraging AI for research and development(NASDAQ: TEM)

news.summary: Informatica, a leading enterprise cloud data management company listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol INFA, revealed its intent to enhance collaboration with Salesforce. The focus is on integrating Informatica’s Intelligent Data Management Cloud™ platform with Salesforce’s Agentforce. Agentforce is Salesforce's digital labor platform that leverages autonomous AI agents to support teams. This advancement in the Salesforce and Informatica partnership will further optimize Agentforce for Sales and streamline workflows with AI-driven solutions.
news.headline: Informatica and Salesforce joining forces to integrate platforms for AI-driven customer intelligence with Agentforce.

news.summary: A strategic exclusive partnership has been established between Asahi Kasei Bioprocess America and PeptiSystems for the peptide manufacturing industry. The collaboration involves companies based in CHELMSFORD, Mass., NOVI, Mich., DÜSSELDORF, Germany, and TOKYO, seeking to optimize operations and expand market presence. This venture aims to leverage the strengths of both firms to capitalize on the growing demand in the industry.
news.headline: Asahi Kasei Bioprocess America and PeptiSystems join hands for peptide manufacturing, enhancing the market.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Affirm (NASDAQ: AFRM) has revealed a fresh collaboration with Mattress Firm, the largest mattress specialty store in the country. Customers can now utilize Affirm to make payments in installments at over 2,200 Mattress Firm stores nationwide and on MattressFirm.com. This partnership coincides with Mattress Firm's Memorial Day sale, a significant yearly event for the retailer. Affirm provides a straightforward payment solution for customers looking to finance their purchases seamlessly.
news.headline: Affirm partners with Mattress Firm, offering flexible payment options at over 2,200 locations for Memorial Day sale.

news.summary: Informatica (NYSE: INFA), based in Redwood City, California, revealed fresh ways to create AI Agents using Amazon Bedrock. This feature empowers users to construct, link, oversee, and coordinate AI agent workflows seamlessly with reliable data and a user-friendly, no-code approach. Informatica has also earned the Amazon Generative AI Competency award and introduced advancements in its analytics lineup for AWS services.
news.headline: Informatica launches new AI agents using Amazon Bedrock, achieving AWS Generative AI Competency. Innovations in analytics portfolio for AWS services included. (Characters: 127)

news.summary: Informatica, a prominent player in enterprise AI-driven cloud data management, unveiled key collaborations with Microsoft at its annual data management and AI conference in Las Vegas. The company, listed as INFA on NYSE, showcased major enhancements to strengthen its partnership with Microsoft as businesses increasingly leverage data for analytics and GenAI endeavors. The focus was on data quality, governance, and copilot experiences essential for enterprises embarking on data-centric initiatives.
news.headline: Informatica partners with Microsoft for data management innovations at Informatica World conference.

news.summary: In New York, Catchpoint, a top Internet Performance Monitoring (IPM) provider, unveiled insights from a recent study by Forrester Consulting, highlighting the significant impact of Internet disruptions on e-commerce and digital-first businesses. The study revealed that enterprises monitoring the complete Internet Stack experience 54% lower losses from disruptions each year compared to those lacking full visibility. This emphasizes the vital importance of comprehensive monitoring in meeting heightened customer demands and maintaining customer satisfaction levels.
news.headline: 2025 Leading Analyst Firm Snapshot: 42% of eCommerce firms lose $6M+ annually due to Internet disruptions. Companies monitoring full Internet Stack lose 54% less.

news.summary: In Norwalk, Connecticut, Xerox Holdings Corporation (NASDAQ: XRX) has revealed that two Lexmark International, Inc. executives will be joining their Executive Committee following the acquisition. Kim Kleps, a prominent figure at Lexmark, will take on the role of Xerox Chief People Officer, starting immediately. This move is set to enhance the leadership team at Xerox with their extensive industry knowledge. The executives are expected to play a vital role in steering Xerox towards a successful future.
news.headline: Xerox adds 2 Lexmark execs to its leadership team post-acquisition to enhance leadership with Kim Kleps as Chief People Officer.

news.summary: Millrose Properties, Inc. (NYSE: MRP), a Homesite Option Purchase Platform for residential homebuilders, disclosed its financial performance for the initial quarter ending March 31, 2025, after becoming an independent entity post its separation from Lennar Corporation on February 7, 2025. The quarter marked the company's first earnings report since the spin-off, with CEO Darren Richm stating it as a thrilling start for Millrose Properties. The announcement showcases the company's progress since becoming independent, further solidifying its position in the market.
news.headline: Millrose Properties released Q1 2025 results post spin-off from Lennar Corp. New independent company marks a promising start.
Coffee chain Reborn and tech company Tori AI agreed to use smart retail tech, enhancing customer experience.

news.summary: On May 14, 2025, Neuronetics, Inc. introduced the inaugural National TMS Therapy Awareness Day, aiming to increase understanding of transcranial magnetic stimulation (TMS) as a viable non-drug therapy for patients facing major depressive disorder, depression with anxiety, and OCD. The event will be an annual occurrence during Mental Health Awareness Month. Neuronetics, Inc. (NASDAQ: STIM), a medical technology and healthcare firm, is a front-runner in neurohealth therapies, committed to revolutionizing patient care. This initiative is a step towards reaching individuals who have not responded well to antidepressants, highlighting the efficacy of TMS in enhancing mental health.
news.headline: Neuronetics launches National TMS Therapy Awareness Day on May 14 to promote TMS as non-drug treatment for MDD, depression, and OCD.

news.summary: Amber International Holding Limited (Nasdaq: AMBR), a prominent provider in the cryptocurrency industry, has collaborated with Hash Global to introduce the BNB Fund. This initiative aims to enhance liquidity in Amber International's crypto reserve, which currently stands at an impressive US$100 million. The partnership is set to bolster the company's position in the market and drive further growth. The announcement was made in Singapore on May 14, 2025.
news.headline: Amber International (Nasdaq: AMBR) partners with BNB Ecosystem to create BNB Fund, injecting US$100M into crypto reserve.

news.summary: The company has ceased communication since the second quarter of 2024 in order to evade accountability for the drastic decline of 99% in the stock's value, resulting in a loss of $1 billion for shareholders. The decision to suspend calls is seen as a defensive move by the management team to avoid facing consequences for their actions.
news.headline: Apollo Technology Capital Corp advises MediPharm shareholders to question management on conference call after stock value decreased by 99%, costing $1 billion. Calls had been suspended since Q2 2024 to avoid accountability.

news.summary: In Dubai, UAE, on May 14, 2025, BOYA introduced two new wireless microphone systems, the BOYAMIC 2 and BOYALINK 3, designed for filmmakers and content creators. These innovative products harness AI technology to enhance audio quality. The launch took place at INTEGRATE Middle East, marking the expansion of BOYA’s global offerings in the audio industry.
news.headline: BOYA introduces BOYAMIC 2 & BOYALINK 3 wireless mics at INTEGRATE Middle East for filmmakers, enhancing audio clarity.

news.summary: Viralgen provides robust AAV gene therapy production services to an expanding network of collaborators as part of a novel approach to creating and marketing rare disease treatments. The collaboration between Boston and San Sebastian, Spain, on May 14, 2025, aims to revolutionize orphan drug development. The Orphan Therapeutics Accelerator (OTXL), a non-profit organization focusing on biotechnology, is spearheading this initiative.
news.headline: Viralgen partners with OTXL to advance rare disease therapies with strong AAV gene therapy manufacturing capabilities.

news.summary: The Global Infrastructure Investor Association is pressing Congress to facilitate international investment in the United States. A statement released in Washington on May 14, 2025, highlighted the urgent need to attract foreign investors to bolster U.S. infrastructure. The association emphasized the importance of cooperation between Congress and the Trump Administration to stimulate investment in the country. This call comes at a crucial time as international investors are eager to inject capital into U.S. infrastructure projects, presenting a significant opportunity for growth.
news.headline: Global Infrastructure Investor Association calls for Congress action to attract international capital to US infrastructure.

news.summary: On May 14, 2025, Workday, Inc. (NASDAQ: WDAY) from Pleasanton, California, declared that Zane Rowe, the company's chief financial officer, will be speaking at the Jefferies Public Technology Conference on May 28, 2025, at 11:00 a.m. Workday is known as an AI platform that focuses on managing personnel, finances, and agents.
news.headline: Workday CFO to address at Jefferies Public Tech Conf on May 28, 2025 at 11:00 a.m. NASDAQ: WDAY, Pleasanton, CA.

news.summary: On May 14, 2025, in Jersey City, New Jersey, it was announced that investment funds managed by affiliates of Strategic Value Partners, LLC, One Investment Management, RXR, and Columbia Property Trust have acquired and recapitalized Hudson House, a deluxe property consisting of 829 units.
news.headline: Companies acquire and recapitalize Hudson House, 829-unit multifamily portfolio in Jersey City, NJ.

news.summary: Announced on May 14, 2025, in Northville, Michigan, Cooper Standard (NYSE: CPS) unveiled its 2024 Corporate Responsibility Report named "Transformation: Change is Constant." This report emphasizes the company's dedication to upholding ethical business standards and environmental responsibility. The release showcases Cooper Standard's unwavering commitment to transparency and sustainability in its operations.
news.headline: Cooper Standard sets carbon neutral targets in Corporate Responsibility Report for 2024, emphasizing commitment to ethics.
